have at least one surgical wound that cannot be observed due to nonremovable dressing? 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0488_STA_PRB_SWND (M0488) Status of Most Problematic Surgical Wound Status of most problematic (observable) surgical wound. 01 = Fully granulating
02 = Early/partial granulation
03 = Not healing
NA = No observable ulcer/wound CHAR 2 x x
M0490_WHEN_DYSPNIC (M0490) Patient Dyspneic/Short of Breath When patient is dyspneic or noticeable short of breath. 00 = Never, patient is not
